section_name: Delivery of Uniform Certificate of Course Completion
text:
(a) A driving safety course provider shall mail an issued uniform certificate of course completion to a person who successfully completes the course.

(b) The certificate must be mailed not later than the 15th working day after the date a person successfully completes the course.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.116 — Delivery of Uniform Certificate of Course Completion

(a) A driving safety course provider shall mail an issued uniform certificate of course completion to a person who successfully completes the course.

(b) The certificate must be mailed not later than the 15th working day after the date a person successfully completes the course.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.106(g), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A driving safety course provider shall mail an issued uniform certificate of course completion to a person who successfully completes the course.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The certificate must be mailed not later than the 15th working day after the date a person successfully completes the course.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.106(g), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
